creator: tant.sinnister@googlemail.com
text:
Created attachment 253847
compile log of ja2

This port does not compile on my 14.1-RELEASE machine, but can be build in a jail running 14.0-RELEASE.

The error point to a problem with devel/sol2 and it lua bindings.

I found an online discussion mentioning a problem with clang18.1.
https://github.com/ThePhD/sol2/issues/1581

Which seems to be the default on 14.1.
